name_cn:
『Burberry Burberry』
B , crafted from grained leather and vintage check, featuring an engraved logo clasp. Equipped with a detachable strap and jacquard-woven brand logo. Easily switch between shoulder bag or handbag styles. Style No. 8350 25 x 8.5 x 18cm.
